issues.description: Card text states '[Opponent's Turn]' but DSL has no duration field. Must add duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' to indicate this effect only occurs during opponent's turn.
Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' not 'HasRestingDon'. The effect requires DON!! cards attached to this card (to return to deck), not resting DON!! on field.
Filter missing cost constraint. Card text specifies 'cost of 6 or less' but filter does not include maxCost:6 restriction.
